ttl.name: TORQUE CONVERTER CLUTCH AND DRIVE PLATE

s3.ptxt: Set SST into the inner race of the one-way clutch.
Install SST so that it fits in the notch of the converter hub and the outer race of the one-way clutch.
Stand the torque converter up and turn the SST.

specitem.ptxt: If the one-way clutch is turned clockwise, it rotates freely and if turned counterclockwise, it locks.

s2.ptxt: Determine the condition of the torque converter clutch assembly.

s3.ptxt: If the inspection result of the torque converter clutch assembly satisfies the following conditions, replace the torque converter clutch assembly.

specitem.ptxt: A metallic sound is emitted from the torque converter clutch assembly during the stall test or when the shift lever is moved to the N position.
The one-way clutch is free or locked in both directions.
The amount of powder in the ATF is greater than the sample shown in the illustration (see the sample).

atten4.ptxt: The sample shows ATF of approximately 0.25 liters (0.26 US qts, 0.22 Imp. qts) that is taken out from the removed torque converter clutch.

s2.ptxt: Exchange the ATF in the torque converter clutch.

s3.ptxt: If the ATF is discolored and/or has a foul odor, completely stir the ATF in the torque converter clutch and drain it.

s2.ptxt: Clean and check the oil cooler and oil pipe line.

s3.ptxt: If the torque converter clutch is inspected or the ATF is exchanged, clean the oil cooler and oil pipe line.

item.ptxt: Spray compressed air of 196 kPa (2 kgf/cm2, 28 psi) from the inlet hose.
If plenty of fine powders are identified in the ATF, add new ATF using a bucket pump and clean it again.

s3.ptxt: If the ATF is cloudy, inspect the oil cooler (radiator).

s2.ptxt: Prevent deformation of the torque converter clutch and damage to the oil pump gear.

s3.ptxt: When there is any damage to the end of the bolt for the torque converter clutch and to the bottom of the bolt hole, replace the bolt and the torque converter clutch.
All of the bolts must be the same length.
Bolts with washers must be used.

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT DRIVE PLATE & RING GEAR SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Set up a dial indicator with a roller instrument and measure the drive plate runout.
Check for damage of the ring gear.
If runout is not within specification or the ring gear is damaged, replace the drive plate.
